description_long: This house features a modern, single-story design with a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, with large windows and sliding glass doors that open onto a green lawn. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, light gray material, contrasting with the white window frames and doors. A row of stylized trees lines one side of the property, providing a natural buffer and visual interest. The house includes a spacious open-plan area, likely serving as a living and dining space, with adjacent private rooms. The entryway is understated, with a direct path leading to the main door and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a geometric layout, surrounded by a green lawn and stylized trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and a section of the green lawn with a single tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of stylized trees and the elongated, linear arrangement of the house.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the open-plan area, multiple rooms, and the transition from indoor to outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Back view emphasizing the flat roof, rear windows, and the full row of trees along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryway with a flush door, no porch, and direct access from the lawn
